records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Bellamy! The C.O.s are retreating!

records.m_Talk_FRA: The sea level has also noticeably lowered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Getting hit by that big of an explosion, I'm sure it'll stay quiet for the time being.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Getting hit by that big of an explosion, I'm sure it'll stay quiet for the time being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The vortex is also stopping. That was a close one.

records.m_Talk_FRA: The vortex is also stopping. That was a close one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can see the top of the island again!

records.m_Talk_FRA: We can see the top of the island again!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess we averted the crisis for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you heard anything... from the Sharks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Not yet, sir. Our lookout was watching the ship, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew I could count on you! I believed that you'd come to our rescue!
